headline: Chest-high S swell with light wind — cleanest it'll be all week, go surf.
today: Solid little day for Ditch: 2-2.6ft from due S at 6s, and the wind stays light-to-glassy from dawn through the afternoon before a light S onshore nudges in the evening. Fish or shortboard, work the incoming tide toward the 2:42p high. Easy call — this is your window before it gets windy midweek.

daysToWatch.note: Big on paper, up to 5-6ft at 7s, but SW cross-on wind blowing 19-21mph all day. Blown out — size you can't use.
The one to rearrange for. Overhead-ish S swell at 6s+ with NNW offshore dawn and morning — solid, clean, worth it. Shortboard weather.
Prime SSE angle at chest-high with light ENE cross in the morning — fun secondary option as it drops from Thursday.
